---
title: "Sprout Up!"
description: Environmental Education for the Next Generation
---

My Sprout Up journey started in Fall 2022 as a second-grade environmental science instructor. All of the moments in the classroom watching kids light up over water conservation, renewable energy, and strawberry DNA extraction made me realize just how much I love environmental education and science communication. I kept teaching every quarter, growing into a lead instructor role by Spring 2023.

By Fall 2023, I stepped into my first leadership position as Development Manager, where I led grant applications that raised over $6,000 to help the program grow. Now, as Director since Fall 2024, I oversee everything from communications with the National Team and weekly program meetings to instructor training and logistics. What started as a weekly classroom visit has turned into one of the most meaningful parts of my undergraduate experience.
